summary: Approved/current, human-confirmed: primary goal is enzyme activity prediction; protein structure generation is an explicit non-goal (ART-CHARTER). Use EnzymeBench v3 snapshot EBV3-7A91 (ART-DATA). Primary metric: macro AUROC; statistical unit: protein family (ART-METRIC). Formal seeds: 7, 21, 42 (ART-SEEDS). Baseline: ESM2-linear at commit c0ffee (ART-BASELINE). Governance: budget is 24 GPU-hours on 2xA100; protected path is data/raw; stop when budget is exhausted or after more than 2 NaN failures (ART-GOVERNANCE). No rejected or deprecated alternatives are supplied.
